{# Override Material theme header for GeoServer customizations This template overrides the Material theme's header.html partial to provide GeoServer-specific header customizations while preserving all existing header functionality including navigation tabs. #} {#- Site title -#} {% set class = "md-header" %} {% if "navigation.tabs.sticky" in config.theme.features %} {% set class = class ~ " md-header--shadow md-header--lifted" %} {% elif "navigation.tabs" not in config.theme.features %} {% set class = class ~ " md-header--shadow" %} {% endif %}
{#- Link to home -#} {% include "partials/logo.html" %} {#- Button to open drawer -#} {#- Header title -#}
{{ config.site_name }}
{% if page.meta and page.meta.title %} {{ page.meta.title }} {% else %} {{ page.title }} {% endif %}
{#- Color palette toggle -#} {% if config.theme.palette %} {% if not config.theme.palette is mapping %}
{% for option in config.theme.palette %} {% set scheme = option.scheme | d("default", true) %} {% if option.toggle %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {#- Site language selector -#} {% if config.extra.alternate %}
{% set icon = config.theme.icon.alternate or "material/translate" %}
    {% for alt in config.extra.alternate %}
  • {{ alt.name }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {#- Repository information -#} {% if config.repo_url %}
{% include "partials/source.html" %}
{% endif %} {#- Button to open search modal -#} {% if "material/search" in config.plugins %} {#- Search interface -#} {% include "partials/search.html" %} {% endif %}
{#- Navigation tabs (collapsing) -#} {% if "navigation.tabs.sticky" in config.theme.features %} {% if "navigation.tabs" in config.theme.features %} {% include "partials/tabs.html" %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
